docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-08-2010 - JUDGMENT.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ABUALSHAER, HISHAM DBA SAM'S MARKET ASSIGNED TO ORANGE CAPITAL SOLUTIONS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT. 8, 2010 APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT. 8, 2010 BY COMM. PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY ABUALSHAER, HISHAM DBA SAM'S MARKET AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SALVADOR DBA S.L. REFRIGERATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO, DEFT.
